nodes.name: estimators
nodes.description: Classifier-agnostic prediction patterns for pairwise causal direction estimation

nodes.name: symmetrized_prediction_fusion
nodes.description: Enforce antisymmetry on paired causal predictions: score(A,B) = -score(B,A)

nodes.name: two_stage_independence_direction
nodes.description: Multiplicative gating: P(dependent) * direction_score for causal scoring
nodes.type_signature: (independence_scores: NDArray[np.float64], direction_scores: NDArray[np.float64], symmetrize: bool = True) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: left_right_decomposed_prediction
nodes.description: Difference of P(X->Y) and P(Y->X) from two separate classifiers
nodes.type_signature: (left_scores: NDArray[np.float64], right_scores: NDArray[np.float64], symmetrize: bool = True) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: weighted_ensemble_combination
nodes.description: Weighted linear combination of multiple estimator predictions
nodes.type_signature: (prediction_arrays: list[NDArray[np.float64]], weights: NDArray[np.float64] | None = None) -> NDArray[np.float64]
